forecasts.short: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before 9pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. West wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. West wind around 6 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Partly cloudy, with a low around 41. Northwest wind around 8 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Chance Rain Showers then Patchy Frost
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 9pm, then patchy frost. Partly cloudy, with a low around 38. Northwest wind 3 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
